architecture-corrections.correction: UpCloud MLflow → File-based MLflow on Network Volume (/opt/vol/mlruns)
UpCloud S3 DVC → Network Volume data cache + s3://minivessdataset fallback
DVC_S3_*/MLFLOW_CLOUD_* env vars → NOT NEEDED. Only RUNPOD_API_KEY + GITHUB_TOKEN
P0 pre-flights and P2 YAML/Makefile → ALREADY DONE (smoke_test_mamba.yaml exists)

phase.name: Build + Push :mamba-latest Docker Image
phase.description: Build Dockerfile.base with INSTALL_MAMBA=1 (CUDA-compiled mamba-ssm==2.3.1). Makefile targets already exist (created in harness fix session).

task.name: Build minivess-base:mamba-latest
task.acceptance: Build exits 0. Verify: `docker run --rm ghcr.io/petteriteikari/minivess-base:mamba-latest python -c "import mamba_ssm; print(mamba_ssm.__version__)"` → 2.3.1

phase.name: Pre-Flight Checks (Corrected)
phase.description:
CORRECTED pre-flight checks. The original plan checked UpCloud MLflow and UpCloud S3 — both WRONG for RunPod environment.
RunPod "env" architecture: - MLflow: file-based on Network Volume (/opt/vol/mlruns) — no server needed - Data: Network Volume cache (/opt/vol/data/raw/) — uploaded from local disk - Fallback: s3://minivessdataset (public, no credentials) - Required env vars: RUNPOD_API_KEY, GITHUB_TOKEN only

task.name: Verify RunPod + GPU availability
task.acceptance: RunPod ENABLED. At least one GPU available.

task.name: Verify Network Volume exists
task.description: Network Volume "minivess-dev" must exist on RunPod for data persistence. If not: create via `sky storage ls` or RunPod dashboard.

commands.cmd: sky storage ls 2>&1 | grep minivess-dev || echo "MISSING — create Network Volume first"

task.acceptance: minivess-dev volume listed in sky storage.
task.failure-action: Create: RunPod dashboard → Storage → Create Network Volume → name=minivess-dev, region=EU Then upload data: make dev-gpu-upload-data

task.name: Verify .env has ONLY required variables
task.description: RunPod env needs ONLY: RUNPOD_API_KEY, GITHUB_TOKEN. NO DVC_S3_*, NO MLFLOW_CLOUD_* (those are UpCloud — archived).

commands.cmd: python3 -c " from pathlib import Path required = ['RUNPOD_API_KEY', 'GITHUB_TOKEN'] env = {} for line in Path('.env').read_text(encoding='utf-8').splitlines(): if '=' in line and not line.startswith('#'): k, _, v = line.partition('=') env[k.strip()] = v.strip() missing = [k for k in required if not env.get(k)] print('Missing:', missing or 'NONE — all set') "

task.name: Verify smoke_test_mamba.yaml is correct

commands.cmd: python3 -c " import yaml from pathlib import Path cfg = yaml.safe_load(Path('deployment/skypilot/smoke_test_mamba.yaml').read_text(encoding='utf-8')) envs = cfg.get('envs', {}) assert envs.get('MLFLOW_TRACKING_URI') == '/opt/vol/mlruns', 'MLflow must be file-based on NV' assert envs.get('DVC_REMOTE') == 'remote_storage', 'DVC fallback must be remote_storage' assert 'DVC_S3_ENDPOINT_URL' not in envs, 'UpCloud S3 vars must NOT be present' assert 'MLFLOW_TRACKING_USERNAME' not in envs, 'UpCloud MLflow auth must NOT be present' vols = cfg.get('volumes', {}) assert '/opt/vol' in vols, 'Network Volume must be mounted at /opt/vol' print('smoke_test_mamba.yaml: ALL CHECKS PASSED') "

task.acceptance: ALL CHECKS PASSED. No UpCloud references in the YAML.

task.name: Verify AMP policy in experiment config

commands.cmd: python3 -c " import yaml from pathlib import Path cfg = yaml.safe_load(Path('configs/experiment/smoke_mambavesselnet_cloud.yaml').read_text(encoding='utf-8')) amp_train = cfg.get('mixed_precision', 'MISSING') amp_val = cfg.get('mixed_precision_val', 'MISSING') print(f'mixed_precision={amp_train} (want True), mixed_precision_val={amp_val} (want False)') assert amp_train is True and amp_val is False, 'AMP policy violation!' print('AMP policy OK (D04: train ON, val OFF)') "

task.name: Launch smoke test via SkyPilot
task.acceptance: Job ID returned. sky jobs status shows PENDING or RUNNING.
task.failure-action: GPU_SOLD_OUT: Try on-demand (default in YAML is use_spot: false). DOCKER_PULL_FAIL: Make GHCR package public or verify GITHUB_TOKEN.

task.name: Monitor job to completion
task.description: Watch for VRAM_PEAK_MB in logs (T09 capture). Expected training time: ~6-10 min on RTX 4090. Expected val_loss: finite (AMP val OFF per D04).
task.acceptance: Job SUCCEEDED. Logs contain: mamba_ssm CUDA ready, VRAM_PEAK_MB=NNNN, finite loss values.

pattern.fix: Verify Dockerfile.base runner stage has CUDA runtime libs for mamba-ssm .so files.
Reduce batch_size to 1 or patch_size to (64,64,64). RTX 4090 (24 GB) should NOT OOM.
Check patch_size divisible by 16. TDD: write test for failing shape, fix BidirectionalMambaLayer.

pattern.description: CORRECTED: Data comes from Network Volume or s3://minivessdataset fallback. NOT from UpCloud S3 (archived).
pattern.fix: Step 1: Verify Network Volume has data: sky exec minivess-dev -- ls /opt/vol/data/raw/minivess/imagesTr/ Step 2: If empty: make dev-gpu-upload-data (uploads from local disk) Step 3: If local data missing too: dvc pull -r remote_storage (AWS S3 public, no creds)

task.name: Extract VRAM measurement from logs

commands.cmd: python3 -c " from pathlib import Path log = Path('/tmp/ralph-mamba-logs.txt').read_text(encoding='utf-8') for line in log.splitlines(): if 'VRAM_PEAK_MB' in line: key, _, val = line.partition('=') mb = int(val.strip()) print(f'T09 VRAM: {mb} MB ({mb / 1024:.1f} GB)') break else: print('WARNING: VRAM_PEAK_MB not found in logs') "

task.acceptance: VRAM measurement printed. Value > 0 and < 24576 MB.

task.name: Update model profile YAML with measured VRAM
task.description: Update configs/model_profiles/mambavesselnet.yaml: vram.measured: true vram.rtx4090_patch64: [measured value in MB]

task.name: Sync MLflow from Network Volume and verify
task.description: CORRECTED: MLflow runs are on the Network Volume, not UpCloud. Sync back to local, then query locally.

commands.cmd: python3 -c " import mlflow mlflow.set_tracking_uri('mlruns') client = mlflow.tracking.MlflowClient() expts = [e for e in client.search_experiments() if 'mamba' in e.name.lower()] print(f'Found {len(expts)} mambavesselnet experiments locally') if expts: runs = client.search_runs(expts[0].experiment_id, order_by=['start_time DESC']) if runs: r = runs[0] print(f'Latest: {r.info.run_id[:8]} status={r.info.status}') val_loss = r.data.metrics.get('val_loss', 'MISSING') print(f'val_loss={val_loss}') "

task.acceptance: mlruns/ synced. At least 1 mambavesselnet experiment. Latest run FINISHED, val_loss finite.

commands.cmd: git commit -m "feat(mambavesselnet): T09 — VRAM measured on RTX 4090, closes #744"

gh issue close 744 --comment "T09 VRAM measured + T10 smoke test PASSED on RunPod RTX 4090. VRAM peak: [NNNN] MB @ patch=(64,64,64), batch=1. MLflow: file-based on Network Volume (/opt/vol/mlruns), synced to local. AMP: train=ON, val=OFF (D04, MONAI #4243). val_loss=finite. Branch: test/mambavesselnet"

cost-model.gpu: RTX 4090 (24 GB Ada Lovelace, BF16 supported)
cost-model.note: Smoke test: 2 epochs, 1 fold, 4 volumes. Infrastructure + VRAM verification only. Production training (100 epochs, 3 folds) on GCP L4 is a separate plan.

close.reason: T09 VRAM measured on RTX 4090 + T10 smoke test PASSED on RunPod (Phase 5 complete)
